'''Gabo''', also known as '''Gabo the Wicked''', was an [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]], wanted by the [[Republic Security Force/Legends|Republic Security Force]] for indecent exposure and illegal [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]] distribution. His [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] was 3,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] alive and 1,500 dead.

He was captured on the [[Outland Transit Station]] by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] for 3,000 credits sometime after the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
